meaning: n.减除,扣除,减除额,推论,演绎
examples: Miss Allan beamed at him. "You are clever to guess. I'm sure I don't know how you did it."—"Deduction," James said.
It was a pretty astute deduction.
He arrived at the solution by a simple process of deduction.
They're helping people build wealth through tax deductions, things like the home mortgage interest deduction.
The threat of a points deduction has not stopped the League Two club attracting new players.
